explanation: The diagram shows multiple bidirectional dependency paths that close loops among core services. In particular, Gate depends on several backend services (including Orca/Clouddriver/Front50/Fiat/Echo/Keel), while those services also have interdependencies that route back through peers (e.g., Orca ↔ Clouddriver/Front50/Fiat chains, Keel → Echo and links into the same backend set), forming circular chains rather than a strict acyclic layering. This indicates cyclic dependency is clearly present.
